title: [Phase 9] Select Kaggle logistics dataset and document selection
body: Document the official Kaggle dataset selection, source URL, access/licensing notes, expected CSV files, key columns, fallback dataset, and why it fits LogiTrack. Acceptance: docs/dataset-selection.md exists and is linked from README.

title: [Phase 9] Create data raw/processed/sample structure
body: Create data/raw, data/processed, and data/sample with .gitkeep/README guidance. Add a small safe sample fixture. Acceptance: directory structure exists and raw large files remain ignored if needed.

title: [Phase 9] Map Kaggle CSV columns to LogiTrack entities
body: Map dataset columns to vehicles, drivers, warehouses/regions, deliveries, delivery_events, alerts, and analytics fields. Acceptance: mapping doc covers required entities and synthetic fallback rules.

title: [Phase 9] Implement idempotent historical import script
body: Build scripts/import_historical_data.py with dry-run and import modes. Acceptance: imports at least 5k deliveries and reruns without duplicates.

title: [Phase 9] Add data quality validation script
body: Build scripts/check_data_quality.py for null, duplicate, FK, enum, date range, and distribution checks. Acceptance: script exits non-zero on critical failures and passes imported dataset.

title: [Phase 9] Verify Analytics with imported historical data
body: Verify analytics endpoints and UI with imported records. Acceptance: summary, filters, driver table, and vehicle table show imported historical data.

title: [Phase 10] Add live vehicle location SSE endpoint
body: Add GET /api/live/vehicles that streams current vehicle location snapshots or latest location updates. Acceptance: endpoint streams vehicle update events and has backend test coverage.

title: [Phase 10] Add vehicle live types and API client subscription
body: Add shared VehicleLiveUpdate type and subscribe helper in api-client. Acceptance: Fleet remote can subscribe without local duplicate types.

title: [Phase 10] Implement status-based markers and legend
body: Render marker style by vehicle status and add visible legend. Acceptance: ACTIVE, IDLE, MAINTENANCE, OFFLINE markers are visually distinct.

title: [Phase 10] Finalize selected vehicle panel and detail navigation
body: Complete marker click side panel and View Details navigation. Acceptance: panel opens/closes and /fleet/vehicles/:id shows real API data.

title: [Phase 10] Add throttled marker update buffer
body: Add markerUpdateBuffer helper that batches updates and keeps only latest update per vehicle. Acceptance: unit tests cover coalescing and flush timing.

title: [Phase 10] Add Fleet Map tests and screenshots
body: Add tests and screenshot proof for Fleet Map, selected panel, and Vehicle Detail. Acceptance: README links current screenshots and tests pass.

title: [Phase 11] Add Spring GraphQL analytics endpoint
body: Add Spring GraphQL dependency, schema, resolver, and analytics queries. Acceptance: GraphQL endpoint returns deliveryAnalytics, regionHeatmap, and routeEfficiency.

title: [Phase 11] Add frontend GraphQL client for analytics remote
body: Add lightweight GraphQL client and query hooks in analytics remote. Acceptance: analytics remote consumes at least one GraphQL query.

title: [Phase 11] Replace delay trend with Plotly chart
body: Use Plotly for delay trend visualization. Acceptance: chart renders imported backend data and handles empty state.

title: [Phase 11] Add D3 region heatmap
body: Add D3 heatmap with region/time buckets and tooltip. Acceptance: heatmap renders real data and has render/tooltip tests.

title: [Phase 11] Implement route efficiency metrics and dashboard
body: Add route efficiency calculations and dashboard section. Acceptance: KPI and table are filter-aware and documented.

title: [Phase 11] Add advanced analytics tests and screenshots
body: Add tests and screenshots for GraphQL, Plotly, D3, and route efficiency. Acceptance: README includes proof screenshots.

title: [Phase 12] Scaffold Streamlit analytics-service
body: Create services/analytics-service with Streamlit app skeleton. Acceptance: service starts locally.

title: [Phase 12] Add PostgreSQL data access layer
body: Connect Streamlit service to PostgreSQL via DATABASE_URL. Acceptance: service queries real database data.

title: [Phase 12] Build data quality and delay distribution views
body: Add data quality overview and delay distribution charts. Acceptance: panels render real imported data and empty fallback.

title: [Phase 12] Build region, driver, and vehicle ranking views
body: Add region breakdown, driver ranking, and vehicle ranking panels. Acceptance: ranking panels render PostgreSQL data.

title: [Phase 12] Add Docker Compose integration and docs
body: Add Dockerfile, Compose service, env docs, and README usage. Acceptance: docker compose up --build analytics-service works on port 8501.

title: [Phase 13] Harden backend pagination, filtering, and sorting
body: Add bounded page sizes, indexed filters, stable sorting, and tests. Acceptance: large list endpoints remain bounded and deterministic.

title: [Phase 13] Add table virtualization for high-volume lists
body: Add @tanstack/react-virtual to high-volume deliveries and analytics tables. Acceptance: 10k row smoke remains usable.

title: [Phase 13] Move chart aggregation to backend queries
body: Ensure charts consume aggregated backend responses instead of raw huge arrays. Acceptance: trend/heatmap/efficiency APIs return bounded series.

title: [Phase 13] Add large dataset performance tests
body: Add large dataset import/test profile and API/UI smoke. Acceptance: performance gates are reproducible.

title: [Phase 13] Record React Profiler before/after notes
body: Capture React Profiler measurements before and after virtualization/aggregation. Acceptance: README includes measured values.

title: [Phase 14] Verify GitHub Actions green on latest commit
body: Verify frontend and backend GitHub Actions jobs are green on latest commit. Acceptance: docs/final-verification.md records run URL/status.

title: [Phase 14] Run and document full-stack Docker demo
body: Run docker compose down -v and docker compose up --build for all services. Acceptance: final verification doc records full-stack pass.

title: [Phase 14] Verify all shell and remote routes
body: Smoke shell and standalone remote routes. Acceptance: dashboard, deliveries, alerts, analytics, fleet, vehicle detail all pass.

title: [Phase 14] Capture final screenshots
body: Capture screenshots for all major screens and services. Acceptance: README links current screenshots.

title: [Phase 14] Add final architecture/data/micro-frontend diagrams
body: Update final diagrams for architecture, data pipeline, and micro-frontends. Acceptance: diagrams are current and README-linked.

title: [Phase 14] Create docs/final-verification.md and final CV bullets
body: Create dated verification checklist and final CV bullets. Acceptance: CV bullets mention only implemented and verified technologies.
